title: Celestial Emperor (Cultivation Rank)
content:
A 
Celestial Emperor
 is the 
Celestial Domain's
 equivalent to the Third Step and thus constitutes almost, if not all, of the 
Sealed Realm's
 Third Step Cultivators.

Contents

1

Status

2

Notable Individuals

2.1

Cultivators who actually use the title

2.2

Cultivators confirmed to be "Celestial Emperors"

3

Trivia

Status
[
]

As this is the ultimate goal of the Celestial Domain that was created to help Sealed Realm Cultivators reach the Third Step despite the existence of the Realm Sealing Formation, it is reasonable that said Cultivators start to use terms like Nirvana Void to describe their levels from this point on.

Only the few who still rule over the Domain or its four subsidiary Celestial Realms actually call themselves Celestial Emperors and even then it's simply like a title to them.

Notable Individuals
[
]

Cultivators who actually use the title
[
]

Qing Lin

Bai Fan

Cultivators confirmed to be "Celestial Emperors"
[
]

Master Lu Fu

Trivia
[
]

The 
Ancient Celestial Emperor
 bears this title as does the 
Lord of the Sealed Realm
, however as the both predate the 
Celestial Domain
, and indeed the latter even created it, they are not Celestial Emperors within the context of the Celestial Domain's Cultivation branch.
